subject: Add _hybrid_{enter,exit}_pc labels to all fixtures
description: Step 1 (structural): add global labels co-located with each csrwi 0x7C0,{0,1} marker in all .S/.c fixtures and rt_c_helpers.h. Verify nm reports both symbols. Re-run existing CSR-mode CTest to confirm labels are inert.
activeForm: Adding hybrid PC labels to fixtures
